paragraphs.text: THE VILLAGE OF CEDREBAT although <the apostle> obstinately refused ar first, he afterwards changed his mind. <Some manuscripts add: when he heard this, he In the village of Cedrebat in the vicinity of the city of Oenoanda was reconciled with his brother>. there is a font which consists of one single piece of stone. And at the paschal feast of the resurrection it suddenly fills up of its own 217. THE BEST ADVICE OF AN ELDER: accord and retains the water until Pentecost. Then suddenly, after THAT A MONK SHOULD NOT GO NEAR A WOMAN Pentecost, the water disappears. Both these wonders are in the Province of Lycia. If anybody does not believe this, it is no Aa elder said: ‘Children, salt comes from water. But if it comes burdensome journey to Lycia where he can inform bimself of the back to water, it is dissolved and disappears. So the monk comes truth. from a woman; and if he comes back to a woman, he is undone and, insofar as his being a monk is concerned, he dies".
